declaration: Generated after the final v0.7 policy and cross-archetype protocol were frozen at cdb4332 and before any final-v2 outcome was evaluated. Each base seed is the first uint32 of SHA-256('hoc-v07-final-frozen-cdb4332|acceptance-v2:<cell>|0'). All 18,000 derived pair scenarios were verified mutually disjoint and disjoint from every prior acceptance/archetype scenario and the concurrently preregistered v4/cross panels.
